root_text.sn22.119:1.3: rūpaṁ ‘netaṁ mama, nesohamasmi, na meso attā’ti samanupassathā”ti?
root_text.sn22.119:1.6: Rūpaṁ, bhikkhave, ‘netaṁ mama, nesohamasmi, na meso attā’ti evametaṁ yathābhūtaṁ sammappaññāya daṭṭhabbaṁ.
root_text.sn22.119:1.10: viññāṇaṁ ‘netaṁ mama, nesohamasmi, na meso attā’ti samanupassathā”ti?
root_text.sn22.119:1.13: Viññāṇaṁ, bhikkhave, ‘netaṁ mama, nesohamasmi, na meso attā’ti evametaṁ yathābhūtaṁ sammappaññāya daṭṭhabbaṁ …

translation_text.sn22.119:1.3: Do you regard form like this: ‘This is not mine, I am not this, this is not my self’?”
translation_text.sn22.119:1.6: Form should be truly seen with right understanding like this: ‘This is not mine, I am not this, this is not my self.’
translation_text.sn22.119:1.10: consciousness like this: ‘This is not mine, I am not this, this is not my self’?”
translation_text.sn22.119:1.13: Consciousness should be truly seen with right understanding like this: ‘This is not mine, I am not this, this is not my self.’
translation_text.sn22.119:1.15: They understand: ‘… there is nothing further for this place.’”
